description_long: This is a freestanding wooden chest of drawers with a rich, dark brown wood grain finish and black metal corner protectors. The chest features four drawers of varying sizes, with two smaller drawers at the top and two larger ones below. Each drawer is equipped with a distinct black metal handle or knob, and two of the drawers are shown partially open, revealing empty interiors. The top surface is flat and bordered by metal corner plates, making it suitable for placing additional items. The overall construction appears sturdy, with a classic, utilitarian design suitable for urban environments such as garages, workshops, or residential entryways.
description: A sturdy, dark wood chest of drawers with black metal handles and corner protectors, featuring four drawers and a flat top surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four drawers, with the top right and bottom drawers partially open, revealing empty interiors and all handles visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the wood grain and the open drawers extending outward, with metal corner plates visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain wooden back panel with no handles or openings, and all metal corner protectors visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the open drawers from a different angle, emphasizing the depth and construction of the side panels.
